verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord I tried to find the verses Say how much I really love You, Lord And I tried to find the verses Say how much I care But it seems like words are not enough To express this love I feel You're wonderful! So wonderful!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, You're wonderful In every single day, more beautiful Than words could ever say "Lord, I love you!" And all I want is more of You You're wonderful! You're beautiful! And I'm so in love with You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are there for me when no one came To comfort and protect me And You gave me strength to keep pressing on When all my strength is gone; You died for me upon the Cross You drived away my deepest doubts What would I do without You?

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When I see Your grace and mercies And the love that You bestowed I just can't tell But I love You, Lord, more and more My desire is to please You In everything I do Just make me more like You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You're my everything I am nothing without You You are my King and I just want to say "Lord, I love You And all I want is more of You You're wondeful, You're beautiful And I'm so in love with You!"
